etymology.description: äşĽ (gather or interpret words) + ĺ†Š (book) = arranging or interpreting books -> phonetic use
etymology.interpretation: The character äľ–(lĂşn) uses the component äşĽ to convey gathering or interpreting, combined with ĺ†Š (book), suggesting the arrangement or reading of books, which relates to the idea of ordering or arranging things, leading to its phonetic use.
